plan.text:
Add 2m timeframe support for signals, exits, and reversals.

Phase 1: Build 2m bars for all dates (backfill from 1m data)
- Run build-mtf-bars.ts with --tf=2m for all dates
- This will aggregate 1m→2m bars with indicator continuity for SPX + all SPXW contracts

Phase 2: Add 2m to config type and autosweep
- Add '2m' to pipeline.timeframe union type in src/config/types.ts
- Add 2m combos to autosweep.ts dirExit parameter space
- Verify cli-config.ts supports timeframe overrides

Phase 3: Validate
- Run a single-day replay with 2m signal/direction/exit timeframes
- Verify bars load correctly and signals fire on 2m candle closes

phases.name: Add 2m to config type and sweep params
